Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Other Mommy | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Your mommy won’t save you. Other Mommy only in theaters October 9.

Can I go inside your heart?

From James Wan, one of the most influential architects of modern horror behind the Saw, Insidious and The Conjuring franchises—and Rob Savage, the director of bold genre films Host and The Boogeyman, comes a terrifying trip into the darkening world of a young girl, Bela, who forms a relationship with a sinister entity in her home who looks uncannily like her own mother.

Academy Award® winner Jessica Chastain (It Chapter Two, The Eyes of Tammy Faye) stars in a dual role as Bela’s mother and as “Other Mommy,” a manifestation of the entity. Jay Duplass (Transparent, Industry) plays Daddo, Bela’s father, and Arabella Olivia Clark (The Housemaid, The Hand that Rocks the Cradle) plays Bela. 

The impressive supporting cast includes Actor Award nominee Dichen Lachman (Severance), Emmy and Tony Award nominee Arian Moayed (Succession) and screen legend Karen Allen (Indiana Jones films).  

From Blumhouse Atomic Monster, Other Mommy is directed by Rob Savage from a screenplay by WGA award winner Nathan Elston, writer for the Emmy-winning sensation Succession, based on the New York Times bestselling novel Incidents Around the House by Josh Malerman (Bird Box).

The film is produced by James Wan, p.g.a., and is executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Rob Savage, Josh Malerman and Ryan Lewis.

snippet.description:

Before the world knew the full story, Danya Devs and Azanda Madlala set social media ablaze with viral pictures that hinted at a joyous union, sparking widespread speculation of an impending marriage. The internet was captivated by what appeared to be intimate moments leading up to a significant commitment. Now, the truth is unveiled: these captivating images were a prelude to the highly anticipated music video for Danya Devs' powerful track, "Abakhongi."

"Abakhongi" refers to the traditional Zulu marriage negotiators, central figures in the sacred process of lobola, symbolizing the deep cultural significance and commitment involved in bringing two families together. This music video masterfully plays on these themes, weaving a narrative that explores love, longing, and the journey towards unity, mirroring the very essence of its title.

Dive into the visual storytelling that brought these viral moments to life. Experience the emotional depth and cultural richness as Danya Devs and Azanda Madlala portray a story of connection and devotion, culminating in a celebration that resonates with the heart of Zulu traditions. Watch the "Abakhongi" music video to witness the full narrative unfold and immerse yourself in the artistry that sparked a national conversation.

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
“Forgive me for all I’ve done” Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters and IMAX December 18. #DuneMovie#FilmedforIMAX

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes Dune: Part Three, bringing Academy Award-nominated filmmaker Denis Villeneuve’s epic trilogy to a breathtaking conclusion.

Dune: Part Three is set nearly two decades after Paul Atreides seized control of the Imperium. Now a ruthless Emperor, Paul must face the consequences of his reign as old allies return, terrifying new threats emerge, and betrayal lurks in every shadow. Haunted by visions of Imperial collapse and the reappearance of his long-lost love, Paul is drawn into a sweeping conspiracy, with Chani at the heart of its unfolding mystery. As rebellion brews and enemies close in, Paul must confront the true cost of power and the fate of those he loves the most.

The film stars Oscar nominee Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Oscar nominee Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach de Bankolé, with Oscar nominee Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Oscar winner Javier Bardem.

Villeneuve directs from a screenplay by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, based on the novels written by Frank Herbert. The film is produced by Oscar nominees Mary Parent, Cale Boyter, Villeneuve and Tanya Lapointe, and Joe Caracciolo, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Thomas Tull, Herbert W. Gains, Brian Herbert, Byron Merritt, Kim Herbert, Kevin J. Anderson, Richard P. Rubinstein, John Harrison and Jessica Derhammer.

Joining Villeneuve behind the camera are Oscar-winning director of photography Linus Sandgren, Oscar-winning production designer Patrice Vermette, Oscar-winning editor Joe Walker, Oscar nominated costume designer Jacqueline West, Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler, and Oscar-winning composer Hans Zimmer.

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present A Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Denis Villeneuve, Dune: Part Three, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on December 18, 2026 and internationally beginning 16 December 2026. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures and in China by Legendary East.

snippet.title: KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS Official Trailer
snippet.description:
KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS in cinemas worldwide with limited screenings from August 12. 
tickets now on sale at http://katseyewildheartsfilm.com/

Two-time GRAMMY®-nominated global girl group KATSEYE is coming to cinemas worldwide with a special theatrical release ahead of their third EP, WILD.

KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is a captivating journey into the group's bold new era while celebrating the fans who helped make it possible. Featuring never-before-seen footage, EYEKONS fan videos, and intimate interviews from the group members, the film explores the powerful bond between KATSEYE and their global fandom. A love letter to the EYEKONS who helped build this movement, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS reveals why this group's story is only just beginning.

From the intense pressure of Dream Academy to chart-topping viral success, audiences experience the highs, setbacks, sacrifices, and breakthrough moments that transformed KATSEYE on their path to global pop stardom. Praised by outlets including The New York Times, Vogue, Rolling Stone, and Billboard, KATSEYE has earned acclaim for their relentless dedication to their craft and electrifying live performances. As one of pop's most exciting emerging global acts, the group continues to solidify its place as a worldwide force.

From the same team that created Netflix’s POP STAR ACADEMY, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is produced by Interscope Films and Boardwalk Pictures, in partnership with HYBE X GEFFEN, and directed by Nadia Hallgren.

Praised by outlets including The New York Times, Vogue, Rolling Stone, and Billboard, KATSEYE has earned acclaim for their relentless dedication to their craft and electrifying live performances. As one of pop's most exciting emerging global acts, the group continues to solidify its place as a worldwide force.

From the same team that created Netflix’s POP STAR ACADEMY, KATSEYE: WILD HEARTS is produced by Interscope Films and Boardwalk Pictures, in partnership with HYBE X GEFFEN, and directed by Nadia Hallgren.

snippet.title: Fast & Furious 11 (2028) | Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Michelle Rodriguez | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#FastForever #fastandfurious #concepttrailer 

Watch This Fast Forever Concept Trailer

What if the final chapter of the Fast saga began with Dominic Toretto buried under millions of gallons of water and ended with the man who built everything on family standing in a burning courtyard with nothing left but the cross around his neck and the people behind him?

This fan-made concept trailer imagines Fast Forever for 2028 where Vin Diesel returns as Dom, waking from a three-year coma after Dante Reyes detonated the Portuguese dam and buried him and Little Brian beneath the flood, while Michelle Rodriguez as Letty Ortiz refused to leave his bedside and Jordana Brewster as Mia Toretto raised his son in hiding from a world that believed Dom was gone.

I personally created every storyboard and visual in this "What If" concept from scratch, building the ultimate final ride where Jason Momoa as Dante has used the silence to construct a global criminal empire from a fortified island compound while the family shattered across the globe, Tyrese Gibson and Ludacris running a low-profile auto shop in Miami, Sung Kang as Han alone in Tokyo, and Charlize Theron as Cipher tracking Dante's network from a dark safehouse waiting for the one man capable of finishing this war to open his eyes.

When Dom finally wakes, uncovers the Charger, and begins reassembling his crew for one last mission, Dwayne Johnson walks out of a black-site facility as Luke Hobbs ready for war and Jason Statham arrives from London as Deckard Shaw with fresh intel as the full family comes together for a global assault that stretches from the streets of Los Angeles to crashing convoys in Rio, drifting through Tokyo nights, and dropping cars from military cargo planes onto volcanic black sand beaches before storming Dante's island fortress. Every visual in this HD concept trailer was designed and built by me to honor the heart, spectacle, and two decades of brotherhood that made the Fast franchise a global phenomenon while delivering the ending this family deserves.

This Fast Forever concept trailer builds to a final confrontation in a burning courtyard where Dom stands face to face with Dante one last time with no army, no weapons, and no tricks, just the faith that family is and always was the most powerful force on Earth, and the man who started this journey in a Los Angeles garage finishes it the only way he ever could, together.

Disclaimer: This is entirely a fan-made concept trailer created for entertainment and creative purposes only. All storyboard work and visuals were originally created by me. This video is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to Universal Pictures, or any official Fast & Furious production or its rights holders.
